title: Fleet Dashboard Reliability Improvements
summary: The fleet dashboard now distinguishes live queue activity from stale heartbeats so GPU and CPU status is less misleading during long-running overnight research.

features.title: Queue-Aware Fleet Status
features.summary: GPU and CPU cards now prefer live queue state, show heartbeat age, and flag stale or failed streams directly on the machine card.
features.description:
The fleet dashboard now derives separate GPU and CPU stream summaries from queue state plus heartbeats instead of over-trusting a single last-seen label. Machine cards surface running, polling, queued, and stale states, show heartbeat age, and display queue progress or failure warnings when a stream needs attention.

This makes the dashboard much more robust during overnight runs, especially when a queue is still active but a heartbeat is stale, or when a machine has finished a CPU wave and is polling for the next batch.
